items.title: Inheritance Act 1833
items.description: An Act for the Amendment of the Law of Inheritance.

items.title: Public Revenue (Scotland) Act 1833
items.description: An Act to provide for the Execution of the Duties performed by the Barons of Exchequer in Scotland in relation to the Public Revenue, and to place the Management of the Assessed Taxes and Land Tax in Scotland under the Commissioners for the Affairs of Taxes.

items.title: Army (Artillery &c.) Pensions Act 1833 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to make further Provisions with respect to the Payment of Pensions granted for Service in the Royal Artillery, Engineers, and other Military Corps under the Controul of the Master General and Board of Ordnance, and with respect to Deductions hereafter to be made from Pensions granted by the Commissioners of Chelsea Hospital

items.title: Sunday Observance Act 1833
items.description: An Act to enable the Election of Officers of Corporations and other Public Companies now required to be held on the Lord’s Day to be held on the Saturday next preceding, or on the Monday next ensuing.

items.title: Inclosure and Drainage (Rates) Act 1833
items.description: An Act to remedy certain Defects as to the Recovery of Rates and Assessments made by Commissioners and other Persons under divers Inclosure and Drainage Acts after the Execution of the final Awards of the said Commissioners.

items.title: Judicial Committee Act 1833
items.description: An Act for the better Administration of Justice in His Majesty’s Privy Council.

items.title: Crown Lands Act 1833
items.description: An Act to extend and enlarge the Powers of the Commissioners of His Majesty’s Woods, Forests, Land Revenues, Works, and Buildings, in relation to the Management and Disposition of the Land Revenue of the Crown of Scotland.

items.title: Public Notaries Act 1833 (repealed 1.7.1991)
items.description: AN ACT to alter and amend an Act of the Forty-first Year Of His Majesty King George the Third, for the better Regulation of Public Notaries in England.

items.title: Slavery Abolition Act 1833 (repealed 19.11.1998)
items.description: An Act for the Abolition of Slavery throughout the British Colonies.

items.title: Fines and Recoveries Act 1833
items.description: An Act for the abolition of fines and recoveries, and for the substitution of more simple modes of assurance.

items.title: Saint Helena Act 1833
items.description: An Act for effecting an Arrangement with the East India Company, and for the better Government of His Majesty’s Indian Territories, till the Thirtieth Day of April One thousand eight hundred and fifty-four.

items.title: Fines Act 1833 (repealed)
items.description: An Act . . . . . . for the more speedy Return and Recovery of Fines Issues, forfeited Recognizances, Penalties, and Deodands . . . . . .
